title: Paakatha Enna Paakatha Lyrics Aaru
stanzas:
pogatha thalli pogaatha
enna vittuvittu
thalli thalli pogaatha

kodutha thiruppi ne ketka
kadhalum kadanumillai
kootathil ninnu paathukola
nadappadhu koothum illa

pogatha thalli pogaatha
enna vittuvittu
thalli thalli pogaatha

venaa venaanu naan irundhen
neethaane enna iluthuvitta
podi podinu naan thoratha
vambula neethaane maativitta

nallaa irundha em manasa
naaraaga kilichuputta
karuppaa irundha en irava
color-a maathiputta

ennudan nadandha en nizhala
thaniya nadakkavitta
ulla irundha en usura
veliye midhakkavitta

pogatha thalli pogaatha
enna vittuvittu
thalli thalli pogaatha

Venaa venanu nenaikalaye
naanum unna verukalaiye
kaanom kaanomnu nee thaeda
kadhal onnum tholaiyalaye

onna irundha niyabagatha
nenjodu serthu vachen
thaniya irukkum valiya mattum
thaniya anubavichen

paravaiyin siragu prinjaathan
vaanathil adhu parakkum
kaathirundhaal thaan
iruvarukkum kadhal arigarikkum

pogatha thalli pogaatha
enna vittuvittu
thalli thalli pogaatha

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Paakatha Enna Paakatha expresses the playful and romantic feelings between lovers, highlighting the joy of love.

What is the context of this song in the movie Aaru?

In Aaru, this song showcases the lead characters' budding romance, filled with fun and excitement.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Sumangali and Tipu.

Who is the music director for this track?

The music for Paakatha Enna Paakatha is composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was this song released?

This song was released on December 9, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paakatha Enna Paakatha, the lively beats and catchy lyrics reflect the carefree spirit of young love. The song captures the playful banter between the lead characters in Aaru, making it a perfect backdrop for their romantic escapades. With its upbeat tempo and engaging melody, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. This duet not only showcases the chemistry between the singers but also enhances the film's vibrant narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paakatha Enna Paakatha from Aaru is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance. With the dynamic vocals of Sumangali and Tipu, paired with Devi Sri Prasad's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you dancing. Experience the joy and energy that makes this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: What do you see, what do you see, with that piercing gaze?
Don't let go, don't let go, even if you push me away, don't let go.
If you give, it won't come back; love doesn't happen in a crowd, it doesn't happen in a dance.
What do you see, what do you see, with that piercing gaze?
Don't let go, don't let go, even if you push me away, don't let go.
I was here saying I don't want it, but you made me feel like I wanted it, and now I can't escape from you.
Our good heart has been shattered, and the darkness has changed the color of my night.
When I walked alone, my shadow was left behind, and my breath was trapped outside.
What do you see, what do you see, with that piercing gaze?
Don't let go, don't let go, even if you push me away, don't let go.
I thought I didn't want it, but I still see you in my dreams, and you search for love that has slipped away.
I have merged your memories with my heart, and I have experienced loneliness in a big way.
If the wings of a bird fly in the sky, it will bring love to both of them if they wait.
What do you see, what do you see, with that piercing gaze?
Don't let go, don't let go, even if you push me away, don't let go.
I won't ask for what you gave back; I won't ask for it.
I am here within you, but you don't understand...
